/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/camera.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libcamera.so -o libcamera.so CMakeFiles/camera.dir/include/camera/lib_opengl/camera_quat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/include/camera/lib_opengl/camera_quat_arc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera.dir/include/camera/lib_opengl/camera_quat_virtual.cpp.o   -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib:/home/rodrigo/Ros2_cam_lidar_calibration/CamLidarApplication/build libglad.so libshader.so
